31],[306,523,1776529880539],[308,522,1776529880565],[309,521,1776529880577],[311,521,1776529880588],[312,520,1776529880599],[313,520,1776529880607],[315,519,1776529880618],[317,518,1776529880634],[318,518,1776529880651],[319,517,1776529880660],[320,517,1776529880689],[321,517,1776529880700],[322,517,1776529880712],[323,518,1776529880731],[324,518,1776529880737],[325,518,1776529880752],[326,518,1776529880767],[327,518,1776529880778],[328,518,1776529880793],[329,518,1776529880806],[330,518,1776529880822],[331,519,1776529880828],[332,519,1776529880856],[334,519,1776529880876],[333,519,1776529880894],[332,520,1776529880903],[330,522,1776529880920],[330,523,1776529880934],[329,523,1776529880947],[327,524,1776529880962],[327,525,1776529880972],[326,525,1776529880983],[324,526,1776529880998],[323,527,1776529881012],[322,528,1776529881020]],"mm-mp":17.12617924528302,"md":[[320,516,1776529880672]],"md-mp":3195.0,"mu":[[320,516,1776529880878]],"mu-mp":3227.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
